description: Main CLI application: Typer command tree for agent lifecycle management (app.py:2)

key_interfaces.name: app
key_interfaces.description: Root Typer app with subcommands: project, irc, agent, setup, template, auth, config

key_interfaces.name: main
key_interfaces.description: @app.callback: resolve project, spawn background update check, enter main session if no subcommand

key_interfaces.name: _get_config
key_interfaces.description: Get project config from typer context, exit if no project selected

key_interfaces.name: _get_irc_config
key_interfaces.description: Resolve IRC connection details from project + global config (rejects old format)

key_interfaces.name: _get_irc_manager
key_interfaces.description: Create IrcManager from project context

key_interfaces.name: _get_agent_manager
key_interfaces.description: Create AgentManager from project context with full IRC + auth config

key_interfaces.name: _enter_main_session
key_interfaces.description: Enter/create the zchat main Zellij session (hub for all projects)

key_interfaces.name: _launch_project_session
key_interfaces.description: Ensure project Zellij session is running, then switch/attach

key_interfaces.name: _create_project_zellij_session
key_interfaces.description: Create new Zellij session: start ergo if local, build layout, write config.kdl

key_interfaces.name: _get_commands_json
key_interfaces.description: Return list-commands output as JSON for zchat-palette plugin

key_interfaces.name: _write_config_kdl
key_interfaces.description: Generate config.kdl with Ctrl-K palette keybinding and plugin paths

key_interfaces.name: _ensure_plugins
key_interfaces.description: Copy bundled .wasm plugins to ~/.zchat/plugins/ if missing or outdated

key_interfaces.name: _version_callback
key_interfaces.description: Print version and exit when --version/-V is passed

key_interfaces.name: cmd_project_create
key_interfaces.description: Create new project with interactive or non-interactive server/channel/type selection

key_interfaces.name: cmd_project_list
key_interfaces.description: List all projects with default marker

key_interfaces.name: cmd_project_use
key_interfaces.description: Set default project and launch/switch to its Zellij session

key_interfaces.name: cmd_project_remove
key_interfaces.description: Remove project after checking for running agents

key_interfaces.name: cmd_auth_login
key_interfaces.description: Authenticate via OIDC device code flow or set local username

key_interfaces.name: cmd_auth_status
key_interfaces.description: Show current auth status

key_interfaces.name: cmd_auth_logout
key_interfaces.description: Clear cached auth tokens

key_interfaces.name: cmd_template_list
key_interfaces.description: List available agent templates

key_interfaces.name: cmd_set
key_interfaces.description: Set a project config value by dotted key

user_flows.name: CLI entry point
steps: load project config if project exists
spawn background update check if not checked today
if no subcommand, enter main zchat Zellij session

user_flows.name: project use (launch session)
steps: if inside Zellij: switch_session (create first if needed)
if outside: create session + attach via os.execvp
_create_project_zellij_session: start ergo, build weechat cmd, write layout.kdl + config.kdl, ensure_session
